title: festuca distans
intro: Festuca distans, also known as tall fescue grass, is a perennial grass species that is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing anxiety, improving digestion, and lowering blood pressure. Festuca distans is often prepared as a tea or infused oil to utilize its medicinal properties, and it can also be used as a herbal remedy in the form of capsules or tinctures.
